description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a tall, slim, rectangular body with a slightly curved top and a wide, stable base. The front face is dominated by a large, vertically oriented touchscreen display, which is framed by a narrow bezel and shows a user interface with various buttons and images. Along the left side of the screen, there are several physical or touch-sensitive buttons, including accessibility icons, suggesting multi-modal interaction. The kiosk is constructed from a dark, likely metallic or composite material, giving it a modern and robust appearance suitable for public urban environments. The sides and rear are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, user-facing front. The overall design is minimalistic, focusing on ease of use and durability for high-traffic areas.
description: A tall, slim, black self-service payment kiosk with a large touchscreen display and side interface buttons, designed for public urban use. Its modern, minimalistic design emphasizes durability and user accessibility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display, interface buttons on the left, and visible user interface elements.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's slim profile and wide base, with no visible interface elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with no visible features or interfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and wide base, mirroring view 1.
attribute_display_screen: A large, vertically oriented rectangular touchscreen display occupies most of the front face, with a narrow bezel and visible digital interface elements.
attribute_payment_interface: Payment interface is implied by the presence of the kiosk but not explicitly visible; likely includes card reader or NFC tap area near the screen or side buttons.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A small digital logo or branding is visible at the top right of the display screen, integrated into the user interface.
attribute_instructional_signage: Instructional icons and text are visible on the touchscreen interface and as side pictograms, including accessibility symbols and navigation buttons.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: No visible receipt dispenser or printer slot is present on the exterior.
